description: Oblikovati's procedural Content Center: a browsable library of standardized machine parts (fasteners, structural shapes, shaft parts, bearings) across ISO/DIN/ANSI. Unlike a template-file catalogue, every part is generated procedurally from curated per-standard dimension tables, so a placed part is a real, fully-constrained (DOF-0) parametric Oblikovati part exposing and constrained by its parameters. Places a standalone Part document and, when an assembly is active, an occurrence into it.
